collectiondata.overview:
Beach Holidays – Where Every Wave Tells a Story | Travelxploria

Swaying palms, golden sands, and the endless rhythm of crashing waves—welcome to Travelxploria’s Beach Holidays, your passport to paradise. Whether you're traveling with your partner, family, or a group of friends, we curate soulful, sunlit escapes across continents. As your Best Travel Agency and trusted Best International Tour Operator, we bring you the finest coastal destinations through thoughtfully designed Couple Packages, Best Family Packages, and Romantic Packages—each one a journey of sunshine and sea.

Let your story unfold in the breathtaking Maldives, where overwater villas float above sapphire lagoons and candlelit dinners sparkle under starry skies. This island haven is the definition of luxury and the ultimate Best Honeymoon Package for couples who crave serenity and indulgence.

In Mauritius, stunning coral reefs meet lush volcanic peaks, creating a postcard-perfect setting for beach lovers. Whether you’re swimming with dolphins or enjoying a sunset cruise, Travelxploria’s Romantic Package here is designed for unforgettable moments.

For those who seek a blend of energy and elegance, Thailand offers island-hopping through Krabi, water sports in Phi Phi, and beachside nightlife in Phuket. It’s a top pick for both thrill-seekers and families, making it perfect for our Best Family Package or a lively Group Tour.

Malaysia surprises with its quiet charms—Langkawi's peaceful beaches and hidden waterfalls create the perfect backdrop for couples and families who seek both relaxation and adventure.

Sri Lanka, with its golden shores and spiritual soul, invites you to surf along Arugam Bay, relax at a coastal Ayurvedic resort, or wander beach towns filled with culture and charm. Whether for bonding or bliss, it’s ideal for every kind of traveler.

Closer to home, the Andaman Islands promise emerald waters and white sandy escapes. Dive into vibrant coral reefs at Havelock, kayak through mangrove forests, or enjoy bonfires by the bay. This Best Tour Package blends exploration with comfort.

For an offbeat gem, Lakshadweep delivers untouched beauty—secluded, serene, and soul-stirring. Perfect for honeymooners or anyone looking to unwind, this is tropical isolation at its finest.

In Europe, Greece brings romance to life with its iconic blue-domed cliffs, volcanic beaches, and Mediterranean charm. Whether it’s Mykonos or Santorini, you’ll fall in love all over again as part of our Best Honeymoon Package.

And finally, no beach escape is complete without Goa—India’s beloved seaside playground. Whether you're dancing under the stars in North Goa or sipping cocktails on quiet southern beaches, it’s a coastal dream come true. Goa’s blend of Portuguese charm, vibrant shacks, and water adventures makes it perfect for couples, friends, and families alike.

With Travelxploria, your Best Tour Operator, you don’t just visit beaches—you live them. As the Best International Tour Operator, we ensure every wave you ride, every sunset you watch, and every island you explore becomes a cherished memory. Whether you’re booking a Couple Package, a fun-filled Best Family Package, or a relaxing Romantic Package, our beach holidays are designed with heart and soul.

The ocean is calling. Let Travelxploria, your Best Travel Agency, take you there.

packages.overview:
Goa Tour Package – Quick Highlights

  • Arrival at Goa – Warm welcome and transfer to hotel/resort for check-in and relaxation.

  • Full Day North Goa Sightseeing – Explore famous beaches like Calangute, Baga, Anjuna, and Fort Aguada.

  • Full Day South Goa Sightseeing – Visit serene spots like Miramar Beach, Dona Paula, Mangueshi Temple, and Basilica of Bom Jesus.

  • Excursion to Dudhsagar Falls – A thrilling visit to the majestic waterfall nestled in the Western Ghats, with optional spice plantation tour.

  • 👋 Departure – Check-out and transfer to airport/railway station with sweet memories of Goa.

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will accompany you on a fascinating North Goa tour. Visit the iconic Fort Aguada Lighthouse, explore the beaches of Candolim, Calangute, & Baga, and enjoy the scenic beauty of Anjuna and Vagator beaches. Don’t miss a visit to the historic Chapora Fort. After a day full of exploration, return to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full day South Goa Sightseeing","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will take you on a delightful South Goa tour. Visit the stunning Old Goa Churches, including the Basilica of Bom Jesus and Se Cathedral, and explore the beautiful Mangueshi & Mahalaxmi Temples. Continue your journey through Margao, Miramar Beach, Donapaula, and the Panjim Church. After a day filled with history and culture, return to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Dudhsagar Falls","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will take you on a scenic drive to Dudhsagar Falls. Located in the Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park amidst the Western Ghats, these majestic falls mark the journey of the Mandovi River from the mountains to Panjim, where it meets the Arabian Sea. The area is surrounded by lush deciduous forests, home to rich biodiversity. While the falls may appear less dramatic during the dry season, they come alive during the monsoon, cascading into a massive sheet of water. Enjoy the natural beauty and serenity of the falls before returning to your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will assist you with your transfer to Goa Airport for your departure. We hope your stay has been truly memorable, and that you carry back a bundle of happy memories with you. It has been a pleasure to serve you, and we look forward to welcoming you on future journeys with Travelxploria. Safe travels.

packages.overview:
• ​Goa: India’s beach paradise, known for its golden beaches, nightlife, Portuguese heritage, and adventure activities.
  • ​North Goa Sightseeing: Explore Aguada Fort, Baga Beach, Anjuna Beach, Vagator Beach, and the vibrant nightlife.​
  • South Goa Sightseeing: Visit serene beaches like Colva and Palolem, Basilica of Bom Jesus, Se Cathedral, and spice plantations.
  • ​Dudhsagar Falls: Witness the breathtaking milky cascades surrounded by lush greenery and enjoy a jeep safari.​

Continue to Margao for a sightseeing tour before heading to the picturesque Miramar Beach and the scenic Dona Paula viewpoint. Conclude the day with a visit to the Panjim Church, soaking in the cultural and architectural beauty of the region. Surrounded by lush deciduous forests teeming with rich biodiversity, the falls offer a mesmerizing spectacle, especially during the monsoon season, when torrential rains transform them into a massive cascading sheet of water. Even during the dry season, the natural beauty of the area remains captivating. With the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria ensuring a seamless experience, enjoy this unforgettable encounter with nature before returning to your hotel.

packages.overview: With Travelxploria, from the moment you touch down in Port Blair, you’ll feel the island breeze as you unwind on the palm-fringed Corbyn’s Cove Beach and later witness the evocative Light & Sound Show at the historic Cellular Jail. A scenic cruise arranged by Travelxploria whisks you to Havelock Island, where you’ll lounge on the powdery sands of Radhanagar Beach until the sky blushes at sunset, then hop aboard a boat for complimentary snorkeling amid the coral gardens of Elephant Beach—complete with seamless hotel pickup and drop-off. Before you know it, you’re marveling at the ebony boulders and crystal waters of Kalapathar Beach, then gliding back to Port Blair by cruise, your hotel waiting to welcome you one last time. At journey’s end, Travelxploria ensures you’re transferred to the airport with a suitcase full of souvenirs and a heart full of island magic.

[{"city":"Port Blair","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Port Blair/1744972786362-AdobeStock_321207750-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Port Blair/1744972786862-AdobeStock_409203105-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Airport Pickup. Later Corbyn’s Cove Beach and Light and Sound Show at Cellular Jail","day_summary":"

Arrive at Port Blair in the morning/afternoon by flight, where our representative from Travelxploria will be waiting outside the airport holding a placard with your name on it. You will be assisted by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria and escorted to your hotel by our best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, ensuring a smooth and comfortable check-in. Take some time to rest and relax before we begin exploring the beauty of Port Blair.

Later, we proceed to Corbyn’s Cove Beach, a stunning coastal drive offering breathtaking views of the open sea on one side. This 4 km scenic stretch provides perfect spots for photography and short breaks to soak in the natural beauty.

Next, we head to the Cellular Jail to witness the enthralling Sound and Light Show, where the heroic saga of India's freedom fighters comes to life. Through dramatic narration and enactments, you will experience the struggle and sacrifices made for India’s independence.

Post completion of this immersive experience, our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a safe and comfortable transfer back to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Blair To Havelock in Cruise. Later Radhanagar Beach visit Until Sunset","day_summary":"

Today, we embark on a journey to one of the most breathtaking destinations in the Andaman Islands, Havelock Island, renowned as the best island in India. Departing from Port Blair, you will board a ferry to Havelock Island, where our representative from Travelxploria will be eagerly waiting to welcome you upon arrival. You will then be escorted to your hotel by our best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, ensuring a seamless check-in experience.

After some relaxation, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will accompany you to Radhanagar Beach, often recognized as one of Asia’s most spectacular beaches. Stroll along the pristine white sands, soak in the natural beauty, and enjoy the mesmerizing ambiance. You will stay at this beach until sunset, witnessing a truly magical sight as the sun dips below the horizon.

Post this unforgettable experience, our representative from Travelxploria will transfer you back to your resort, where you can relax and unwind, cherishing the beauty of Havelock Island.

packages.overview: Over six unforgettable days, you’ll land in Port Blair and dive straight into history with a guided tour of the Cellular Jail followed by the evocative Light & Sound Show, then drift into island time as you stroll Corbyn’s Cove at sunset. On day two, catch an early ferry to Havelock Island, settle into your beachfront cottage, and spend the afternoon lazing on powdery Radhanagar Beach before sipping coconut water as the sky blushes at dusk. Day three brings underwater thrills—choose between snorkeling or scuba diving off Elephant Beach’s coral fringes—then unwind amid the ebony boulders of Kalapathar Beach. Midweek, you’ll ferry to tranquil Neil Island for two nights of serene exploration: cycle to the Natural Bridge, swim in Bharatpur’s clear shallows, and toast a pastel sunset at Laxmanpur Point. On day five, return to Port Blair to wander the ruins of Ross Island’s colonial relics and hunt handcrafted souvenirs at Sagarika Market. Finally, after a leisurely breakfast by the sea or one last dip at Corbyn’s Cove, you’ll be transferred to the airport, suitcase full of memories and a camera brimming with island magic

Later Corbyns Cove Beach and Light and Sound Show at Cellular Jail","day_summary":"

Arrive at Port Blair in the morning/afternoon by flight, where our representative from Travelxploria will be waiting outside the airport, holding a placard with your name on it. Our best on-ground support staff will ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel, where you can rest and relax.

Later, accompanied by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, we proceed to Corbyn’s Cove Beach. The coastal drive to this beach is breathtaking, with a stretch of around 4 km offering stunning views of the open sea on your left. You can take pit stops along the way to click pictures and soak in the beauty.

Afterward, we head to the iconic Cellular Jail to witness the enthralling Sound and Light Show, where the heroic saga of India’s freedom struggle is brought to life. The reenactment of the freedom fighters’ journey is both inspiring and emotional.

Post completion of this memorable experience, our Travelxploria team will drop you back at your hotel for an overnight stay.

Check out from the hotel in Havelock Island and board a premium cruise to Neil Island. Upon arrival, our representative from Travelxploria will be there to assist you with a smooth check-in at your resort. After some relaxation, we proceed to explore the top attractions of Neil Island.

We begin with a visit to the Natural Rock Formation, also known as Howrah Bridge. This stunning natural wonder, formed over the years by coral deposits, stands beautifully at Beach No. 2. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will share fascinating insights about this geological marvel.

Next, we head to Laxmanpur Beach, a secluded paradise located 2 km north of Neil's jetty, perfect for unwinding and witnessing a breathtaking sunset. After this scenic experience, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure your comfortable return to the hotel for a restful night.

Ferry Timing: The ferry from Havelock to Neil Island is scheduled around 10:00 AM. Ferry schedules are subject to change, and our team will keep you updated accordingly.

After relaxing and refreshing, we embark on a local shopping tour in Port Blair, where you can purchase souvenirs, handicrafts, and gifts for your loved ones.

Post shopping, our on-ground support staff will ensure your smooth drop-off at the hotel for an overnight stay.

Note: If your hotel is located far from the main city, our team will take you for shopping before hotel check-in to optimize your time.

For return ferry preferences from Neil to Port Blair, kindly update the Travelxploria holiday planner. Hotel checkout in Neil Island is usually at 9 AM.

packages.overview: Touching down in Port Blair, you’ll wander the palm-fringed sands of Corbyn’s Cove Beach before stepping into history at the Cellular Jail’s evocative Light & Sound Show. The following morning, a scenic ferry whisks you to Havelock Island, where the world-famous Radhanagar Beach invites you to sink your toes into powdery white sand and watch the horizon glow at dusk. Your island-hopping continues to Neil Island for thrilling water sports at Bharatpur Beach and a pastel-hued sunset at Laxmanpur Beach, then on to the majestic rock arches of Howrah Bridge before returning to Port Blair for a final, restful night. As you check out and head to the airport, Travelxploria ensures your departure is as seamless as your journey—leaving you with sun-kissed memories and a longing to return.

Upon arrival at Veer Savarkar Airport, Port Blair, our representative from Travelxploria will be there to welcome you with a warm smile. You will then be escorted to your hotel by our best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, where you can rest and relax.

Later, embark on a scenic journey to Corbyn’s Cove Beach, one of the most picturesque, sandy, coconut-palm-fringed beaches, just seven kilometers from Port Blair town—an ideal spot for swimming and sunbathing. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will provide insights into the history and significance of this serene beach.

Following this, visit the historic Cellular Jail, formerly known as Kala Pani, a colonial prison used by the British to exile political prisoners. Our expert tour guide from Travelxploria will narrate intriguing stories about the struggle for India's independence.

As the evening sets in, witness the mesmerizing Light and Sound Show at Cellular Jail, where the heroic saga of India's freedom fighters is brought to life. Our on-ground support team from Travelxploria ensures you have a seamless and comfortable experience throughout the trip.

After this captivating experience, we drop you back at your hotel for a restful overnight stay in Port Blair.

Upon arrival, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will be there to greet you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel for check-in.

In the afternoon, get ready to visit the world-famous Radhanagar Beach (Beach Number 7), often hailed as the Best Beach in Asia. With our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, discover the mesmerizing beauty of this stunning beach and immerse yourself in its tranquil surroundings.

After soaking in the breathtaking views and experiencing the serene sunset, our Travelxploria team will transfer you back to your hotel, where you can unwind and relax. Stay overnight in Havelock.

After breakfast, check out from the hotel, and our representative from Travelxploria will assist you in boarding the scheduled ferry from Havelock Island to Shaheed Dweep (Neil Island)—a paradise of unexplored coral reefs, diverse marine life, white sandy beaches, and lush tropical forests.

Upon arrival at Neil Island, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will warmly receive you and escort you to your hotel for check-in, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free experience.

Later, embark on a visit to Bharatpur Beach, a stunning shoreline known for its vibrant marine life and adventure activities. With the guidance of our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, you can indulge in snorkeling, glass-bottom boat rides, or other thrilling water sports (available at an additional cost).

In the afternoon, head to Laxmanpur Beach, a secluded gem renowned for its breathtaking sunset views. Witness the sky transform into shades of gold and orange as you relax by the shore.

After an eventful day, our Travelxploria team will ensure a comfortable drop-off at your hotel. The evening is free for leisure or self-exploration. Stay overnight in Neil Island.

packages.overview: From the moment you touch down in Port Blair with Travelxploria, you’ll be swept into the laid-back rhythm of island life: stroll along the swaying palms of Corbyn’s Cove Beach by day and watch history come alive under the stars at the Cellular Jail’s Light and Sound Show by night. The next morning, Travelxploria’s curated cruise whisks you to Havelock Island, where Radhanagar Beach unfurls its powder-white sands as you linger until sunset’s golden glow fades. Day three brings an adrenaline-charged snorkeling excursion at Elephant Beach—explore vibrant coral gardens teeming with tropical fish before returning by speedboat. On day four, sail on to Neil Island and find yourself spellbound by Laxmanpur Beach’s fiery horizon at dusk. Day five is yours to roam among the Natural Rock Formation and the tranquil shores of Bharatpur Beach before you drift back to Port Blair. Then, step back into the Andamans’ colonial past on Ross Island and dive into thrilling water sports off North Bay Island on day six. Finally, with your heart full of sunlit memories and your camera brimming with snapshots of turquoise seas and verdant landscapes, Travelxploria ensures your airport drop-off is seamless—leaving you already dreaming of your next escape to these island paradises.

Arrive at Port Blair in the morning/afternoon by flight, where our representative of Travelxploria will be waiting outside the airport holding a placard with your name on it. You will be escorted to your hotel by our best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, where you can rest and relax. Later, our experienced tour guide of Travelxploria will accompany you to Corbyn’s Cove. The coastal drive to this beach is breathtaking, with a stretch of around 4 km offering stunning views of the open sea on your left—an experience to cherish. Take pit stops along the way to capture beautiful moments and immerse yourself in the scenic beauty.

Afterward, proceed to the enthralling Sound and Light Show at Cellular Jail, where the heroic saga of India’s freedom struggle comes alive. Witness the powerful enactment of freedom fighters’ sacrifices and their relentless fight for independence. Post completion of this immersive experience, our Travelxploria representative will drop you back at your hotel for a comfortable overnight stay.

Depart from Port Blair to Havelock Island via a scenic ferry ride. Upon arrival, our representative of Travelxploria, along with our best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, will be there to receive you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel.

Later, our experienced tour guide of Travelxploria will accompany you on an unforgettable visit to Radhanagar Beach, one of Asia’s finest white sand beaches. Bask in the stunning beauty of this natural wonder, take a leisurely walk along the shoreline, and enjoy the serene ambiance. Stay at the beach until sunset, witnessing the mesmerizing hues of the evening sky.

Post this magical experience, our Travelxploria team will ensure a comfortable drop-off at your resort, where you can relax and unwind, making the most of your stay in this paradise.

If you wish to relax, simply soak in the scenic beauty of the turquoise waters while enjoying delicious local food options available at the beach.

After an eventful day, our Travelxploria team will escort you back to Neil jetty, where you will board a premium cruise to Port Blair. Upon arrival, our representative of Travelxploria will greet you at the dock and ensure your comfortable transfer to the hotel for an overnight stay.

Let’s step back in time as our representative of Travelxploria, along with our experienced tour guide of Travelxploria and the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, takes you to Ross Island, the first administrative settlement of the British in the Andaman Islands. Once known as the \"Paris of the Past,\" this island still holds the fascinating ruins of the luxurious lifestyle enjoyed by the British during that era. Wander through the remnants of this historic site and soak in its rich colonial past.

From Ross Island, we continue our journey by boat to North Bay Island, the famed Coral Island of Port Blair. Blessed with an abundance of rich marine life, North Bay Island is one of the most sought-after destinations in Andaman. Here, you can dive into adventure with Scuba Diving, Sea Walk, Snorkeling, and a thrilling Glass Bottom Boat Ride, offering you a mesmerizing view of the vibrant underwater world.

After a day filled with exploration and adventure, our Travelxploria team ensures a smooth return, allowing you to relax and unwind after an unforgettable experience.

Should you wish to explore any additional attractions during your free time, kindly inform our Travelxploria team, and we will be happy to assist in making the most of your remaining time in Andaman.

packages.package_name: Andaman Sea & Sand Tour – Island Hopping
packages.overview: With Travelxploria, your Andaman adventure begins the moment you step off the plane in Port Blair—feel the soft breeze at Corbyn’s Cove Beach by day and, as dusk falls, watch history illuminate the night sky at the Cellular Jail’s Light and Sound Show. The next morning, glide across glittering waters on a private cruise to Havelock Island, where the world-famous Radhanagar Beach beckons you to sink your toes into its ivory sands and bask in a breathtaking sunset. On day three, set sail for the vibrant coral gardens of Elephant Beach—enjoy a leisurely boat ride and complimentary snorkeling as kaleidoscopic fish dance around you. Then, on day four, discover the dramatic black boulders and serene shoreline of Kalapathar Beach before drifting back to Port Blair in style. Finally, Travelxploria ensures a seamless airport transfer as you depart with your heart full of sunlit memories and a promise to return to these island paradises.

[{"city":"Port Blair","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Port Blair/1744972786362-AdobeStock_321207750-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Port Blair/1744972786862-AdobeStock_409203105-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Airport Pickup Later Corbyn’s Cove Beach and Light and Sound Show at Cellular Jail","day_summary":"

Arrive at Port Blair in the morning/afternoon by flight, where our Travelxploria representative will be waiting outside the airport, holding a placard with your name on it. You will be greeted with warmth and transferred to your hotel, where you can relax and unwind after your journey.

Later, we proceed to Corbyn’s Cove Beach, a mesmerizing coastal stretch around 4 km long, with breathtaking views of the open sea on your left. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, ensuring you don’t miss the best viewpoints for stunning photographs and memorable experiences. Take pit stops along the way to soak in the serene beauty and capture unforgettable moments.

As the evening sets in, we head to the historic Cellular Jail to witness the enthralling Sound and Light Show, where the valiant tales of India's freedom struggle come to life. The powerful narration and reenactment of the sacrifices made by freedom fighters will leave you deeply moved.

After this immersive experience, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure your comfortable transfer back to your hotel, marking the end of an exciting first day in the Andaman Islands.

packages.overview:
Travelxploria representative will receive you and transfer you to Bangaram Island for check-in and relaxation.
Enjoy an optional excursion to Thinnakkara Island for beach exploration and swimming with turtles, then return to Bangaram.
Spend the day at leisure or indulge in optional water activities at Bangaram Island.
After breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will drop you at Agatti Airport for your onward journey.

Day excursion to Thinnakkara","day_summary":"

On this day, we have planned an exciting excursion to Thinnakkara Island, located just 20 minutes away from Bangaram Island. After a short boat ride, you'll arrive at this beautiful, uninhabited island, perfect for exploration. Take a leisurely walk around the island, enjoying the stunning natural beauty, serene surroundings, and pristine sandy beaches. Feel free to take a refreshing dip in the clear waters, swim with the turtles, and snorkel in the shallow waters to admire the colorful marine life. The island offers a peaceful atmosphere, ideal for relaxing and immersing yourself in nature. After a memorable day spent exploring Thinnakkara, you'll return to Bangaram Island by boat in the evening. Relax at your resort for the night, with dinner served, reflecting on your beautiful island experience. This unforgettable day promises to be one of the highlights of your Lakshadweep adventure. Overnight stay at the resort.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Bangaram island","day_summary":"

Today, enjoy a full day at the beautiful Bangaram Island, a true tropical paradise surrounded by turquoise waters and soft, sandy beaches. Spend the day at your own pace, indulging in leisure activities or simply relaxing by the serene shoreline. For those seeking adventure, this is the perfect opportunity to experience a range of exciting water activities such as snorkeling, kayaking, windsurfing, or scuba diving, all amidst the vibrant marine life and colorful coral reefs. The calm lagoons and crystal-clear waters of Bangaram make it an ideal spot for both beginners and seasoned adventurers. You can also stroll along the pristine beaches, soak up the sun, or just unwind while enjoying the island’s untouched natural beauty. As the sun sets, marvel at the stunning views over the ocean before heading back to your accommodation. Overnight stay at Bangaram Island, ensuring a truly unforgettable experience in this island paradise.

packages.overview:
• Report at the Lakshadweep Wharf, board the ship, and depart by 1500 hrs. Enjoy lunch, evening tea, and dinner onboard.

  • Arrive at Kavaratti at 0845 hrs, enjoy activities like glass-bottom boat, snorkeling, kayaking, and visit the museum. Depart at 1700 hrs.

  • Arrive at Kalpeni at 0800 hrs, enjoy snorkeling, sea bath, folk dance, and sightseeing. Depart at 1730 hrs.

  • Arrive at Minicoy at 0945 hrs, visit the lighthouse, swim, kayak, and explore the village. Depart at 1600 hrs.

  • Arrive in Kochi and disembark between 1100 hrs and 1500 hrs.

packages.overview:
Travelxploria representative will receive you at Agatti Airport and assist with a boat transfer to Kavaratti Island for check-in and relaxation.
Enjoy sightseeing around Kavaratti, visiting the local village, lighthouse, and serene beaches, followed by a relaxed evening.
Boat transfer back to Agatti, followed by sightseeing at South Beach, Eastern Jetty, and an afternoon boat trip to the beautiful Kalpitti Island.
Relax at Agatti Island or opt for an optional visit to the stunning Thinnakkara Island (payable at the property).
After breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with a timely transfer to Agatti Airport for your departure.

1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Kavaratti Island","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, set out for a day of sightseeing and exploration. Begin by visiting a local village, where you can immerse yourself in the island’s simple yet vibrant way of life, observing the daily routines and traditions of the warm, friendly community. Next, proceed to the island’s iconic lighthouse, an impressive structure offering panoramic views of the stunning coastline and azure waters — a perfect spot for photography and soaking in the beauty of your surroundings. Continue your journey to one of the serene beaches, where you can stroll along the soft sands, enjoy the gentle sea breeze, and perhaps take a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. As the day winds down, spend a relaxing evening at the beach, watching the sun set over the horizon. Later, return to your accommodation to unwind and relax, ending another wonderful day on this enchanting island.

On this day, our TravelXploria representative will transfer you to the boat jetty for your vessel journey to Agatti Island, a scenic sea transfer that takes approximately 2.5 hours. Upon arrival at Agatti jetty, our local assistant will warmly receive you and escort you to your homestay. After refreshing yourself, you will proceed for an Agatti Island sightseeing tour, including visits to the picturesque South Beach and the Eastern Jetty, the main point for ship embarkation and disembarkation. Following lunch, embark on an exciting afternoon excursion to Kalpitti Island, a small, uninhabited paradise located at the southern tip of Agatti. Accompanied by an experienced guide, you will take a private boat for a 30-minute journey across stunning waters. Enjoy the pristine sandy beaches, swim alongside turtles, and snorkel in the crystal-clear, shallow waters. After sightseeing on foot, return to Agatti in the evening to relax. Dinner will be served at 8:30 PM, followed by an overnight stay at Agatti.

Spend your day strolling along the pristine white sandy beaches, basking under the warm tropical sun, or simply unwinding amidst the island’s tranquil surroundings.

If you are feeling adventurous, you may opt to indulge in optional activities like kayaking, stand-up paddleboarding, or snorkeling to discover the vibrant coral reefs nearby. packages.overview:
• An inspired island retreat where mind, body and spirit rejoice, JW Marriott Mauritius Resort is set against the dramatic backdrop of UNESCO World Heritage Site, Le Morne Brabant Mountain.
  • Located on the spectacular Le Morne Peninsula, this luxury resort benefits from an exceptional coastal position, with endless views across white sands, protected coral reefs and the sparkling Indian Ocean.
  • A haven for leisure, our immersive quality inspires rest and relaxation. Combining Mauritian grace and modern comfort, 169 suites offer calm sanctuary, some with direct beach access and lagoon vistas. Fostering connection, there is a rich array of activities and mindful experiences to suit all generations.
  • The island’s culinary tradition is reflected at the five dining venues, where the choice ranges from local cuisine to world-class Indian, Japanese and Pan Asian options. The resort intentionally guides you to reconnect with the natural world.
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Mauritius","country":"Mauritius","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963981460-AdobeStock_128667384.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963981715-AdobeStock_164381882 (1).jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963982299-AdobeStock_166065656.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963982492-AdobeStock_236139821.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Mauritius: Arrival","day_summary":"

Upon your arrival at Mauritius airport, you will be warmly welcomed by a Travelxploria representative. From there, you will be comfortably escorted to your resort in a private vehicle.

After checking in at the resort, take some time to refresh and unwind. If time permits, feel free to explore the nearby surroundings at your own pace or simply relax and soak in the peaceful ambiance of the island.

As evening sets in, enjoy a delicious dinner served at the resort, savoring the delightful flavors with your family. Later, retreat to the comfort of your cozy bed for a restful night’s sleep, recharging for the exciting days ahead.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

Your Travelxploria representativegreets you at your hotel for a seamless pick-up a hearty breakfastsetting the stage for a day in paradise.Under the guidanceof Travelxploria host, hop on a speedboatand glide across crystal-clear waters to the breathtaking Île aux Cerfs. Feel the adrenaline as you take on a thrilling tube ride, bouncing over the waves with laughter and excitement. Once on the island, relax on pristine beaches, snorkel in vibrant lagoons, or explore hidden coves. Whether you choose to sunbathe, swim, or indulge in optional water sports, every moment is pure bliss. As the day winds down, sail back to the mainland, where your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back at your hotel, leaving you with sun-kissed memories of an unforgettable island escape.

Rise and shine with our representative from Travelxploria will greet you for a seamless pick-up in a private vehicle as you embark on an unforgettable North Island tour. Start your day with a delightful breakfast in hotel sipping fresh tropical juices while the waves set the perfect vibe. With your expert guide, explore the vibrant capital Port Louis, wandering through the historic Aapravasi Ghat and the lively Central Market, where spices and souvenirs fill the air with exotic aromas. Stroll along the Caudan Waterfront, indulging in boutique shopping and scenic harbor views. Next, marvel at the serene beauty of Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, home to giant water lilies and rare plant species. After a delicious Mauritian lunch (optional), continue to Grand Baie, the island’s lively coastal town, perfect for a relaxing beach walk or some retail therapy. As the sun begins to set, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Mauritius.

packages.overview:
• Part of Mauritius’s undeveloped east coast, 3*+ Friday Attitude hotel is nestled in the peaceful fishing village of Trou d’Eau Douce. It has a deeply relaxing atmosphere that’s ideal for a holiday with your family, friends or partner.
  • Come for the salty smell of the Indian Ocean, and the typically blue tropical sky. And come to enjoy a magnificent fine-sand beach, and to indulge in simply doing nothing, swimming or watersports. Accompanying you throughout your stay, our Family Members will provide a welcome filled with Mauritius’ famous cheerfulness.
  • Throughout your holiday, expect zero stress. Instead, the forecast is for fun and relaxation– because, here, it's Friday every day!

As evening descends, delight in a delicious dinner served at the resort — a perfect time to savor local flavors and enjoy quality moments with your family. Afterward, retreat to the comfort of your room for a restful night’s sleep, recharging for the exciting days ahead.

packages.overview:
• Born in an era of glamorous travel, Le Méridien believes everyone should explore the world in style. Le Méridien Île Maurice effortlessly blends style and relaxation, offering a vibrant oasis for families with 261 elegantly appointed rooms stretching along the beach.
  • Here, every age is catered to with thoughtful, immersive experiences. Younger guests are invited to explore and connect with new friends from around the world in a playful environment, while parents enjoy exclusive spaces designed for peace and quiet.
  • Family bonds are nurtured through curated activities and screen-free, digital detox programs that encourage shared moments of connection. Authentic culinary journeys and cultural discoveries further immerse families in the island’s rich heritage, offering a deeper connection to Mauritius.
  • Here, we help families disconnect from the everyday, only to reconnect with each other, crafting sophisticated, unforgettable memories that will echo long after the vacation ends.

With your expert guide, explore the vibrant capital Port Louis, wandering through the historic Aapravasi Ghat and the lively Central Market, where spices and souvenirs fill the air with exotic aromas. Stroll along the Caudan Waterfront, indulging in boutique shopping and scenic harbor views. Next, marvel at the serene beauty of Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, home to giant water lilies and rare plant species. After a delicious Mauritian lunch (optional), continue to Grand Baie, the island’s lively coastal town, perfect for a relaxing beach walk or some retail therapy. As the sun begins to set, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Mauritius.

packages.package_name: Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa
packages.overview:
• Located on an island in the Indian Ocean, the Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa, Mauritius is an adult-only resort offering a serene tropical getaway on Mauritius's eastern shores. Experience stunning ocean views, beach activities, and nearby attractions like Grand Bay and Flacq Market. Our 4-star resort features comfortable rooms with modern amenities, including two on-site restaurants, a spa, a pool, and a stylish conference room with picturesque views, ideal for intimate meetings of up to 16 attendees.
  • Experience comfort at Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa, Mauritius, an exclusive adults-only haven. Delight in a unique culinary adventure at one of our onsite dining options, rejuvenate your senses at our serene on-site spa, and stay active at our state-of-the-art fitness center.
  • Bask in the sun by our pristine pool, or explore the stunning surroundings with our convenient bike rental service. Enjoy the added comforts of concierge assistance, free Wi-Fi, and 24-hour room service, for an unforgettable stay.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

Your Travelxploria representativegreets you at your hotel for a seamless pick-up a hearty breakfastsetting the stage for a day in paradise.Under the guidanceof Travelxploria host, hop on a speedboatand glide across crystal-clear waters to the breathtaking Île aux Cerfs. Once on the island, relax on pristine beaches, snorkel in vibrant lagoons, or explore hidden coves. Whether you choose to sunbathe, swim, or indulge in optional water sports, every moment is pure bliss. As the day winds down, sail back to the mainland, where your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back at your hotel, leaving you with sun-kissed memories of an unforgettable island escape.

packages.overview:
• The island of Mauritius was uninhabited before its first recorded visit by Arab sailors in the end of the 10th century. Its name Dina Arobi has been associated with Arab sailors who first discovered the island.
  • Mauritius Island is relatively young geologically, having been created by volcanic activity some 8 million years ago. Together with Saint Brandon, Réunion, and Rodrigues, the island is part of the Mascarene Islands.
  • Lagoon Attitude has also an idyllic location for windsurfing and kitesurfing in Mauritius. Its typical Mauritian architecture and natural decoration offer a peaceful Mauritian stay.

packages.overview:
• Located in the Indian Ocean, Mauritius is renowned for its white-sand beaches, turquoise lagoons, and coral reefs — making it a top destination for relaxation and water activities.

  • The island offers a rich cultural blend of Indian, French, Creole, Chinese, and African influences, reflected in its cuisine, festivals, and everyday life.

  • Beyond its beaches, Mauritius boasts lush green mountains, scenic waterfalls, nature parks, and adventure activities like hiking, snorkeling, dolphin watching, and more.

[{"city":"Mauritius","country":"Mauritius","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963981460-AdobeStock_128667384.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963981715-AdobeStock_164381882 (1).jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963982299-AdobeStock_166065656.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963982492-AdobeStock_236139821.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Mauritius: Arrival","day_summary":"

Welcome to the enchanting island nation of the Indian Ocean — your unforgettable Mauritius family holiday begins here!

Upon your arrival at the Mauritius airport, a Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and escort you to your resort in comfort.

After checking in, take some time to refresh and relax. Depending on your arrival time, feel free to explore the nearby surroundings at your own pace or simply unwind and soak in the serene beauty of the island.

As evening descends, delight in a delicious dinner served at the resort — a perfect time to savor local flavors and enjoy quality moments with your family. Afterward, retreat to the comfort of your room for a restful night’s sleep, recharging for the exciting days ahead.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

Rise and shine with our representative from Travelxploria will greet you for a seamless pick-up in a private vehicle as you embark on an unforgettable North Island tour. Start your day with a delightful breakfast in hotel sipping fresh tropical juices while the waves set the perfect vibe. With your expert guide, explore the vibrant capital Port Louis, wandering through the historic Aapravasi Ghat and the lively Central Market, where spices and souvenirs fill the air with exotic aromas. Stroll along the Caudan Waterfront, indulging in boutique shopping and scenic harbor views. Next, marvel at the serene beauty of Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, home to giant water lilies and rare plant species. After a delicious Mauritian lunch (optional), continue to Grand Baie, the island’s lively coastal town, perfect for a relaxing beach walk or some retail therapy. As the sun begins to set, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Mauritius.

packages.overview:
• Located on the south coast of Mauritius in the nature reserve of Bel Ombre
  • Classic plantation-style architecture showcasing the island's heritage for an immersive travel experience
  • Various guest activities connecting guests to Mauritian culture, including Sega music & dancing, cooking classes, rum tasting and more
  • Partnered with Reef Conservation in their inclusive and holistic conservation initiatives for the wider Bel Ombre and South West Coast communities

packages.overview:
• Here at Furaveri Maldives, a premier luxury resort in Maldives, we offer a variety of cozy options for your stay, from entry level Garden Villas to luxurious Ocean Pool Villas and Residences, which have been specifically designed to meet guests individual preferences and are set among lush vegetation and over water, on a sandy white beach or settled above a sparkling turquoise lagoon.
  • Take experiences and adventures to the next level with our watersports team, Reyla Adventures. Our team offers a wide variety of motorized and non-motorized activities and excursions in the Maldives for you to live the adventure.
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Male","country":"Maldives","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Maldives/Male/1744963840668-AdobeStock_51524562.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Maldives/Male/1744963841857-AdobeStock_63675188.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Maldives/Male/1744963841988-AdobeStock_104056643.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Paradise – Beachfront Bliss Begins","day_summary":"

Arrival in paradise marks the beginning of your dream escape to the Maldives. As you land at the airport, a warm welcome awaits from a Travelxploria representative who will escort you to your luxurious beachfront resort. Check in, refresh, and soak in the stunning turquoise views right from your villa. Feel the soft sand beneath your feet and let the gentle ocean breeze relax your senses. Your unforgettable Maldivian beachfront bliss starts here—pure serenity and luxury await.

","day_element":[{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"5":[{"h_id":1383,"h_name":"Furaveri Maldives","h_country":"Maldives","h_city":"Male","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Furaveri Maldives/1745908955566-Furaveri Maldives.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Furaveri Maldives/1745908955664-Furaveri Maldives 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Furaveri Maldives/1745908955789-Furaveri Maldives 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Furaveri Maldives/1745909646353-Furaveri Maldives 3.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Furaveri Maldives/1745909646468-Furaveri Maldives 4.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Furaveri Maldives/1745909646471-Furaveri Maldives 5.jpg\"}]"}]}},{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Ferry","from":"Male Velena International Airport","to":"Male","splitStops":[]}}]},{"day_title":"Explore the Island & Rejuvenate","day_summary":"

Wake up to the sound of gentle waves and enjoy a leisurely breakfast by the beach. Spend the morning exploring the island—bike through nature trails, visit the local hydroponic garden, or relax on the beach with a good book. After lunch, pamper yourself at Furaveri Spa, where holistic treatments are offered in a serene garden or overwater setting. As the sun begins to set, consider a sunset cruise or simply unwind with cocktails at the beach bar, followed by a delicious seafood dinner.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Adventure or Serenity – Your Choice","day_summary":"

Today is yours to tailor. Opt for adventure with activities like kayaking, snorkeling at the house reef, or joining an excursion to nearby sandbanks and uninhabited islands. Alternatively, enjoy a relaxed day soaking in the sun, taking a yoga session, or joining a Maldivian cooking class. In the evening, treat yourself to a beachfront BBQ or romantic candlelight dinner by the ocean.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Furaveri","day_summary":"

On your final day in paradise, take an early morning beach walk and savor a tropical breakfast. Enjoy your last swim or a peaceful moment on your villa deck before checking out. You’ll then be transferred back to Malé via seaplane or domestic flight, leaving with lasting memories of your beachfront escape at Furaveri Maldives.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Ferry","from":"Male","to":"Male Velena International Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview:
• Sleek and spacious accommodations make Sun Siyam Iru Veli the ultimate tropical retreat. With front row lagoon views and a freshwater pool for every five star suite, all you have to do is check in, chill out and let our neighbouring dolphins provide your entertainment as they swim past each day.
  • From the moment you arrive, shoes are left at the door, so forget dress codes and come as you are. Here we live the barefoot idyll, so sit back and sink your toes into the softest white sand – it doesn’t get better than this.
  • Priding ourselves on innovation, our main restaurant has a daily-changing menu to mix up seasonal flavours, and we serve plenty of the ocean’s bounty with the best seafood you’ll ever taste. You can even watch exotic fish pass under the glass floor below as you sink into a relaxing massage. It’s time to discover the true meaning of rest and rejuvenation here on our sapphire waters.
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Male","country":"Maldives","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Maldives/Male/1744963840668-AdobeStock_51524562.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Maldives/Male/1744963841857-AdobeStock_63675188.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Maldives/Male/1744963841988-AdobeStock_104056643.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Luxury – Beachfront Welcome","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at Velana International Airport in Malé, you’ll be whisked away on a scenic 40-minute seaplane flight to the stunning island of Sun Siyam Iru Veli. After a warm Maldivian welcome, check into your spacious Beach Villa with a private pool, steps away from powder-soft sands and turquoise waters. Spend your afternoon soaking up the sun, dipping into your pool, or enjoying the tranquil beach. In the evening, enjoy a gourmet dinner at Aqua Orange, the resort’s all-day dining venue offering global cuisine in a beautiful lagoon-front setting.

Start your day with an ocean-view breakfast, then explore the lagoon with included non-motorized water sports like kayaking, snorkeling, or stand-up paddleboarding. For diving enthusiasts, consider booking an optional scuba excursion to the nearby coral reefs. In the afternoon, indulge in a luxurious treatment at Sun Siyam Spa, with its serene overwater pavilions and holistic therapies. Wrap up your day with sunset cocktails at Chemistry Bar followed by dinner at Grouper Grill, where fresh seafood is the star.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Adventure or Pure Relaxation – You Choose","day_summary":"

Enjoy your morning at leisure—opt for a sunrise beach walk, private yoga session, or simply lounge by your villa’s pool. After breakfast, embark on an optional dolphin-spotting cruise or sandbank picnic for a picture-perfect afternoon. If you prefer to stay on the island, relax at the infinity pool or join a wine-tasting session hosted by the resort’s sommelier. End your final night with a romantic private dining experience on the beach, under a blanket of stars.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure – Last Moments in Paradise","day_summary":"

Savor your final island breakfast and take in the peaceful atmosphere one last time. Enjoy a swim or short beach stroll before check-out. You’ll then board your return seaplane to Malé, carrying with you the serene memories of your 3-night beach villa escape at Sun Siyam Iru Veli.

packages.overview:
• Embrace the magical Indian Ocean experience from a vibrant beach or overwater villa, offering stunning ocean views. Refreshingly friendly, caring service and playfully designed spaces create a fun, free-spirited stay.
  • A fun, chilled-out balance is at the heart of the dining experience at the limited-service all day dining restaurant, Element X. Share memorable family moments over flavoursome feasts and convenient self-service beverage counters. Immerse in a multi-layered experience at the lively X360 bar – with a uniquely interactive, fun, and exuberant ambience.
  • OBLU XPERIENCE Ailafushi is a Green Globe certified resort. Sensitive handling of island ecosystems, sustainable drinking water solutions, supporting local communities, and other green initiatives are the norm here.

packages.overview:
• Medhufushi Island Resort is a heaven of peace and relaxation. An air of tranquility pervades the idyllic island which is adorned with shady coconut trees and tropical flowers. Surrounding the island is a spectacular lagoon in shades of turquoise and shimmering azure blue. If you want to get away from it all and experience affordable, laid-back rustic at a Maldives resort, you can’t find anywhere better than Medhufushi Island Resort.
  • When only pure luxury will do, Medhufushi Spa has everything you need to feel relaxed, refreshed and revived. Located over the crystal-clear water of the lagoon, this stunning spa treats its visitors to an array of indulgent experiences, from classic spa treatments to luxurious therapies inspired by the changing seasons. Combining modern and traditional therapies Medhufushi Spa is the perfect place to unwind. Our four treatment suites can be reserved and is a must-visit for honeymooners and couples looking for a truly special experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Maldives","day_summary":"

packages.package_name: Sheraton Maldives Full Moon Resort & Spa
packages.overview:
• Featuring effortless elegance in relaxing spaces, our Maldives family suites serve as your idyllic sanctuary after an adventure-filled day on the island. The resort offers a wide range of rooms, from understated deluxe rooms to charming cottages, boastful ocean pool villas, and indulging water villas.
  • Relax in our exquisite 74 sqm Water Villa with Pool, perfect for a serene retreat. This one-bedroom haven features premium amenities, a spacious day bed, private dining area, kitchen, and a beautifully designed bathroom. Enjoy classic decor and a stunning 180-degree view of the Indian Ocean, making it an ideal setting for an unforgettable escape.

Awake to breathtaking views of the turquoise lagoon and enjoy a hearty breakfast by the water. Dive into an exciting day of water sports—snorkeling at the resort’s house reef, a guided paddleboarding tour, or a diving excursion (optional) to explore nearby coral gardens. After lunch, head to Shine Spa for a rejuvenating massage or signature treatment in an overwater spa villa. Wind down your day with sunset cocktails at Anchorage Bar followed by dinner at Feast, featuring international cuisine and live cooking stations.

Spend a blissful leisure day in your exquisite Maldives Water Villa, perched above the crystal-clear lagoon, where you can wake up to panoramic ocean views, enjoy a refreshing swim right from your private deck, relax on sun loungers surrounded by endless blue, indulge in a soothing bath with a view, and let the gentle sounds of the waves lull you into serenity—creating the ultimate escape of luxury, privacy, and unforgettable moments amidst the Indian Ocean’s tranquil beauty.

After breakfast, check out from your Water Villa and transition to a beautifully appointed Beach Villa surrounded by lush tropical vegetation and steps away from powdery white sand. Spend the morning basking in the sun or exploring hidden corners of the island. In the afternoon, consider a cooking class with Maldivian chefs or book a sunset dolphin cruise for an unforgettable experience on the water. For dinner, indulge in a beachfront BBQ under the stars with personalized touches.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Custom Adventures or Pure Relaxation","day_summary":"

This day is completely yours—wake up at your own pace and choose how you’d like to spend your time. Go kayaking or jet skiing through calm lagoons, visit nearby sandbanks, or simply relax in a hammock with a good book. If you're up for something unique, enjoy a private floating breakfast in your villa pool or reserve a couple’s spa ritual. Capture one last magical Maldivian sunset and celebrate your final evening with a candlelit dinner by the ocean.

packages.package_name: Centara Ras Fushi Resort & Spa Maldives
packages.overview:
• ​With powdery white sand beach leading out into the clear waters of the Indian Ocean, dazzling sunsets and an array of attractive dining venues, Centara Ras Fushi Resort & Spa Maldives creates a stylish yet timeless tropical escape to celebrate life’s special moments.
  • As one of the most romantic spots you could ever dream of for a wedding or vow renewal, our dedicated event team can arrange every last detail of your beachfront ceremony, complete with traditional Maldivian touches all combining to create an unforgettable experience.​

packages.overview:
• Experience paradise at Kandooma Maldives. Choose from our Garden, Beach or Water Villas, or our spacious Two and Three-Bedroom Villas and Beach Houses, all fully furnished with modern amenities. Our villas offer easy access to the beach, ocean or lagoon, blending comfort and nature.
  • Dining Be inspired by spectacular views while you indulge in delicious Maldivian and international cuisine from our three restaurants. Start your daily island adventure with our complimentary breakfast buffet.

packages.overview:
• Traditional Maldives meets modern design at Sun Siyam Olhuveli, with accommodationsr anging from Maldivian-inspired suites to sleek contemporary villas. Designed to cater to your every whim, we’ve three pools to choose from, including an adults-only infinity pool that never fails to impress – but be warned, the lagoon may entice you into adventure.
  • It all begins on the water, and whether it’s parasailing, kitesurfing or diving, there’s countless ways tostay active. Our outstanding cuisine holds the ocean at its heart, too, with creative menus served across our selection ofrestaurants and bars, all prepared by world-class chefs.

In the evening, enjoy your final night with a fine dining experience, perhaps paired with a glass of wine and the sounds of gentle waves beneath you.

packages.overview:
Bali, Kuta, and Gili together create the ultimate tropical escape, blending adventure, culture, and relaxation. Bali, the Island of the Gods, enchants with its lush landscapes, ancient temples, and vibrant traditions. Kuta, known for its lively beaches, buzzing nightlife, and shopping streets, is perfect for those seeking energy and excitement. In contrast, Gili Islands offer a tranquil retreat with crystal-clear waters, white sandy beaches, and a laid-back atmosphere. Whether you’re chasing waves in Kuta, exploring Bali’s cultural gems, or snorkeling in Gili’s vibrant coral reefs, each destination offers a unique experience. Together, they craft an unforgettable journey through paradise, where every sunrise brings a new adventure and every sunset leaves you longing for more.

​

Kuta, a vibrant hub of culture and excitement, invites you to explore its many attractions. With the guidance of our experienced tour guide and the best on-ground support staff, discover the serenity of Vihara Dharmayana Temple, unwind at the hidden gem of Gunung Payung Beach, or indulge in retail therapy at Mal Bali Galeria. As the evening unfolds, savor local delicacies at Kuta Night Market before our team ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

Embark on a breathtaking full-day adventure, guided by our experienced Travelxploria tour expert and backed by the best on-ground support staff for a seamless experience. Begin at Pura Ulun Danu Beratan, a floating temple on Beratan Lake, where the tranquil setting is picture-perfect. Next, strike a pose at the iconic Handara Gate, its towering stone pillars set against lush mountains. Continue to Wanagiri Hills, a dreamy spot for stunning selfies overlooking Tamblingan and Buyan Lakes. Wrap up the day at Banyumala Waterfall, a hidden paradise where you can trek through the jungle and take a refreshing dip. Enjoy seamless hotel pick-up and drop-off, ensuring a stress-free journey with unforgettable memories.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Half-Day: Watersports (Parasailing Adventure/Flying Fish, Banana Boat and Jet Ski) at Tanjung Benoa ","day_summary":"

Experience the beauty of Turtle Island and Tanjung Benoa Beach ensuring a seamless and exciting adventure. Your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will pick you up from your hotel and take you to Tanjung Benoa Beach, where you can enjoy thrilling water sports like jet skiing, banana boat rides, and parasailing or relax by the shore. Then, hop on a glass-bottom boat to Turtle Island, a conservation sanctuary where you can interact with sea turtles and other rescued wildlife. With the best on-ground support staff, enjoy a well-organized experience filled with adventure and discovery. After an unforgettable day, you’ll be dropped off at your hotel with cherished memories of Bali’s coastal wonders.

Join Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide for an exhilarating snorkeling tour around the Gili Islands, where adventure meets breathtaking marine beauty. Begin at Gili Trawangan’s underwater Vespa, a unique dive site perfect for capturing stunning photos. Next, head to Gili Meno, where you’ll explore vibrant coral reefs, schools of tropical fish, and the mesmerizing underwater statues designed to support coral growth. Continue to Gili Air’s Fish Garden, a snorkeling paradise teeming with turtles and colorful marine life. Take a break with a delicious island lunch before enjoying leisure time to soak in the island’s charm. With seamless hotel pick-up and drop-off by the best on-ground support staff, this tour promises an unforgettable underwater adventure

Next, marvel at the majestic views of Mount Batur and Lake Batur from the Kintamani Volcano viewpoint, where the breathtaking scenery leaves you in awe. Feel the essence of Bali’s rich heritage and natural beauty at every stop. Capture unforgettable momentsas you explore this enchanting region. As the day draws to a close, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a comfortable and hassle-free experience.

packages.overview: Bali, the Island of the Gods, is a paradise of lush rice terraces, sacred temples, and vibrant culture. From the artistic charm of Ubud to the sun-kissed beaches of Kuta and Uluwatu, every corner of Bali offers something magical. Just a boat ride away, the Gili Islands provide a serene escape with crystal-clear waters, white sandy beaches, and colorful coral reefs. Whether snorkeling, cycling around the islands, or simply unwinding by the sea, Gili offers a tranquil contrast to Bali’s lively energy. Together, Bali and Gili create a dream getaway filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments.

Start your day with a seamless hotel pick-up by Travelxploria’s expert team. First, visit the breathtaking Tegenungan Waterfall, a perfect spot for stunning views. Then, explore the lush Tegalalang Rice Fields, where endless greenery creates a serene escape. Wander through the Ubud Monkey Forest and meet its playful macaques before soaring on the Aloha Swing—choose from Chair, Single, or Ship for an unforgettable thrill. Stroll through the vibrant Ubud Village, soaking in its rich culture. Experience Ubud’s beauty in a scenic Jeep ride, guided by experienced team and best on-ground support staff. With smooth pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria ensures a hassle-free adventure—because we always give you the best experience for your tour.

With Travelxploria’s seamless service, continue your journey to Lombok Island after a hearty breakfast. Our representative will escort you to the jetty for a speedboat transfer from Gili Trawangan to Teluk Kode, Lombok. Upon arrival, our experienced local guide will take you to Baun Pusuk (Monkey Forest), where playful monkeys roam freely. Next, trek to the majestic Sendang Gile Waterfall at the base of Mount Rinjani, a stunning natural retreat. Enjoy a delicious lunch at a local restaurant before returning to Gili Trawangan by speedboat. Spend the evening at leisure, soaking in the island’s charm. Overnight stay in Gili.

​After a delightful breakfast, embark on a fascinating Sasak Traditional Tour with Travelxploria’s expert guide and on-ground support team. Begin at Banyumulek Village, famous for its exquisite handcrafted pottery, and continue to Sukarara Village, where skilled artisans weave intricate Songket cloth using age-old techniques. Enjoy a delicious lunch at a local restaurant before heading to Rambitan Village, where you’ll experience the unique architecture and culture of the Sasak people. Finally, soak in the breathtaking beauty of Kuta and Tanjung A’an Beaches. After a day of cultural discovery and scenic wonders, return for a relaxing overnight stay in Gili.​

packages.overview:
Bali, often called the "Island of the Gods," is a tropical paradise known for its breathtaking landscapes, vibrant culture, and warm hospitality. With its pristine beaches, lush rice terraces, and majestic temples, Bali offers a perfect blend of adventure, relaxation, and spiritual experiences. From the bustling streets of Kuta and Seminyak to the serene charm of Ubud’s jungles and waterfalls, every corner of the island has something unique to offer. Whether you're exploring ancient temples, enjoying thrilling water sports, or indulging in Balinese cuisine, Bali captivates every traveler with its unparalleled beauty and rich traditions.

​

Embark on an unforgettable adventure with Travelxploria, where our experienced guide ensure a seamless journey. Begin your day with a comfortable transfer to the base of Mount Batur, where an exhilarating trek awaits. As you ascend, take in the breathtaking scenery of the surrounding mountain ranges. Upon reaching the summit, witness a spectacular sunrise casting golden hues over Lake Batur and Mount Agung—a truly magical sight. Explore the volcanic terrain, feel the warmth of the natural steam vents, and capture unforgettable moments. After descending, return to your hotel for some well-deserved rest, cherishing the thrill of this once-in-a-lifetime experience.

packages.overview:
Imagine stepping off the plane in Denpasar and feeling the warm Hawaiian breeze of Bali envelop you—this is where Travelxploria’s expertly curated seven-day sojourn begins. As your private guide whisks you to the clifftop temple of Uluwatu at sunset, you’ll witness waves crashing beneath ancient stone guardians, all while learning the legends that make Bali the “Island of Gods.” The next morning, stroll through emerald rice terraces in Ubud with a local agrarian, then savor authentic ayam betutu at a family-run warung. Midweek, we’ll board a speedboat to Nusa Penida, where crystal-clear waters beckon you to snorkel alongside manta rays and explore hidden sea caves. Adventure continues as you chase hidden waterfalls in the heart of the jungle before an evening of traditional kecak dance under a starlit sky. Throughout your journey, Travelxploria guarantees seamless transfers, handpicked boutique hotels, and heartfelt encounters—from a Balinese cooking class in a countryside villa to a rejuvenating massage inspired by ancient healing rituals. By the time you bid farewell, Bali’s enchanting beauty and Travelxploria’s warm hospitality will have woven an experience that lingers in your heart—and calls you back to the tropics again and again.

​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, preparing for an unforgettable Ubud sightseeing adventure.Our dedicated representative will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless start to your journey.Immerse yourself in the artistic soul of Ubud Village, known for its vibrant culture and traditional craftsmanship. Stroll through the lush Tegallalang Rice Terraces, a stunning landscape of cascading greenery. Next, marvel at the majestic views of Mount Batur and Lake Batur from the Kintamani Volcano viewpoint, where the breathtaking scenery leaves you in awe. Feel the essence of Bali’s rich heritage and natural beauty at every stop. Capture unforgettable momentsas you explore this enchanting region. As the day draws to a close, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a comfortable and hassle-free experience.

Wander through the Ubud Monkey Forest and meet its playful macaques before soaring on the Aloha Swing—choose from Chair, Single, or Ship for an unforgettable thrill. Stroll through the vibrant Ubud Village, soaking in its rich culture. Experience Ubud’s beauty in a scenic Jeep ride, guided by experienced team and best on-ground support staff. With smooth pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria ensures a hassle-free adventure—because we always give you the best experience for your tour.

Next, head to the famous Handara Gate, a perfect blend of nature and Balinese architecture, offering a picture-perfect moment. Conclude your day with a flavorsome Indian dinner, before returning to your comfortable hotel in Kuta.​

Begin at the serene Taman Ayun Temple, surrounded by lush gardens and lotus ponds. Next, visit the iconic Tanah Lot Temple, perched on a sea rock, where crashing waves create a breathtaking scene. Continue to Uluwatu Temple, standing dramatically on a cliff, and witness the mesmerizing Kecak and Fire Dance at sunset. Stop by the Kedaton Monkey Forest before unwinding at Padang Padang Beach. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support, enjoy a smooth return to your hotel for a restful evening.​

packages.overview:
Imagine landing in Denpasar and stepping into Bali’s spiritual embrace—this is where Travelxploria’s tailor-made seven-day escapade unfolds. As your chauffeur escorts you to a cliff-top villa near Uluwatu, you’ll witness the sun casting golden hues over the “Island of the Gods” while ancient stone guardians stand sentinel. Mornings begin with a guided trek through emerald rice terraces in Tegallalang, learning age-old irrigation secrets from local farmers, then continue with bespoke yoga sessions overlooking Mount Agung’s mist-shrouded peak. Dive into crystal-clear waters off Nusa Lembongan, snorkeling among colourful coral gardens, or board a traditional jukung boat at dawn to chase the sunrise over the horizon. By day three, you’ll be immersed in Balinese culture—joining a temple blessing ceremony at Besakih, mastering intricate dance moves in a private workshop, and sampling mouthwatering lawar and satay at a family-run warung. Evenings sparkle with handcrafted cocktails beneath swaying palms, while Travelxploria arranges intimate beachside dinners complete with gamelan musicians. With seamless transfers, handpicked boutique sanctuaries, and heartfelt local encounters—from a cooking demonstration in a countryside estate to a sunset Kecak fire dance—Travelxploria ensures every moment in Bali feels both effortless and enchanted, leaving you longing to return to this unforgettable paradise.

​

Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

packages.overview:
Imagine touching down on Bali’s sun-kissed shores as the scent of frangipani and sea salt greets you, your heart already racing with the promise of adventure. With Travelxploria orchestrating every moment, you’ll drift from the surf-sculpted waves of Kuta at dawn to the emerald-carpeted rice terraces of Ubud by noon, each transfer handled in comfort and style. Our local guides—steeped in Balinese lore—will lead you through the sacred clifftop temples of Uluwatu and Tanah Lot at sunset, where ancient stone guardians stand watch over the roaring Indian Ocean. As twilight falls, join a hypnotic Kecak fire dance under a starlit sky, then awaken the next day for an exclusive yoga session overlooking Mount Agung’s misty silhouette. We’ll whisk you off to Nusa Penida’s dramatic coastal cliffs for heart-pounding snorkeling with manta rays, before treating you to a private beachside feast of babi guling and sate lilit as the waves lap the shore. From seamless first-class flights and hand-picked boutique villas to insider experiences that dive into Bali’s living traditions, Travelxploria turns your dream of the Island of Gods into a story you’ll treasure forever.

​

Experience the perfect blend of Bali’s natural beauty and coastal charm with Travelxploria’s seamless service and best-in-class support. Begin your day with a delicious breakfast before our friendly representative picks you up for an exciting journey. Visit the breathtaking Ulun Danu Beratan Temple, a stunning lakeside sanctuary in Bedugul, surrounded by misty mountains and serene waters. Admire the beauty of Lake Beratan, offering picture-perfect scenery. After exploring Bali’s highlands, head to Tanjung Benoa Beach, a paradise for water sports lovers, where you can relax on golden sands or indulge in thrilling activities. End your day with hassle-free transfers, ensuring a memorable and effortless experience.​

Start your day with a delicious breakfast, then our Travelxploria representative will pick you up for a scenic journey to Ulun Danu Beratan Temple, a stunning water temple set against the serene backdrop of Lake Beratan. ​Discover the enchanting beauty of East Bali with our seamless service and best-in-class support. Start your day with a delicious breakfast, then set off with our Travelxploria representative for a magical journey. Visit the iconic Lempuyang Temple, home to the famous “Gate of Heaven”, offering breathtaking views of Mount Agung. Continue to Tirta Gangga, a stunning royal water palace with serene pools and elegant stone carvings. Next, explore the hidden gem of Tukad Cepung Waterfall, where sunlight streams through the cave, creating a surreal atmosphere. End your adventure with a comfortable return to Kuta, ensuring an unforgettable experience.​

Conclude your day at Melasti Beach, before returning with hassle-free transfers, ensuring a magical Bali experience .​

Start your day with a seamless hotel pick-up by Travelxploria’s expert team. First, visit the breathtaking Tegenungan Waterfall, a perfect spot for stunning views. Then, explore the lush Tegalalang Rice Fields, where endless greenery creates a serene escape. Wander through the Ubud Monkey Forest and meet its playful macaques before soaring on the Aloha Swing—choose from Chair, Single, or Ship for an unforgettable thrill. Stroll through the vibrant Ubud Village, soaking in its rich culture. Experience Ubud’s beauty in a scenic Jeep ride, guided by experienced team and best on-ground support staff. With smooth pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria ensures a hassle-free adventure—because we always give you the best experience for your tour.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, preparing for an unforgettable Ubud sightseeing adventure.Our dedicated representative will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless start to your journey.Immerse yourself in the artistic soul of Ubud Village, known for its vibrant culture and traditional craftsmanship. Stroll through the lush Tegallalang Rice Terraces, a stunning landscape of cascading greenery. Next, marvel at the majestic views of Mount Batur and Lake Batur from the Kintamani Volcano viewpoint, where the breathtaking scenery leaves you in awe. Feel the essence of Bali’s rich heritage and natural beauty at every stop. Capture unforgettable momentsas you explore this enchanting region. As the day draws to a close, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a comfortable and hassle-free experience.
