[{"city":"Ho Chi Minh","country":"Vietnam","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928970552-1740906922813-AdobeStock_341738451-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971259-1740906923260-AdobeStock_507072856-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971624-1740906923520-AdobeStock_625826732-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival Ho Chi Minh – Half Day City Tour","day_summary":"

Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City! Upon arrival at Saigon Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 15-minute transfer to your hotel, where you will check in and relax after your journey. Please note: Standard hotel check-in time is 2:00 PM. Early check-in is subject to hotel availability. Once you're refreshed, Travelxploria’s guide will pick you up for an exciting city exploration tour. Begin with a visit to the iconic Central Post Office, a masterpiece designed by Gustave Eiffel, followed by the majestic Notre Dame Cathedral, inspired by its famous counterpart in Paris. Next, gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s history at the War Remnants Museum, which presents a powerful and thought-provoking perspective on the Vietnam War (known locally as the American War). Continue to the historic Independence Palace, a symbol of the country’s reunification, before heading to Ben Thanh Market, where you can immerse yourself in the vibrant local culture, shop for souvenirs, and taste delicious Vietnamese street food.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

Your journey begins with a smooth flight from Ho Chi Minh to the tropical paradise of Phu Quoc, where our Travelxploria representative awaits to welcome you. From the moment you land, everything is effortlessly arranged for your comfort. packages.overview: Beneath emerald rice terraces and mist-shrouded peaks, Travelxploria reveals Vietnam’s soul in a single, seamless journey. You’ll drift into Halong Bay aboard an intimate wooden junk, lanterns glowing as towering karsts rise like ancient sentinels from glassy waters. By dawn, a cyclo awaits to carry you through Hanoi’s labyrinthine alleys, where the scent of sizzling bánh mì mingles with the chatter of morning markets. In the heart of the city, our local scholar guides you through hidden courtyards of the Temple of Literature, whispering tales of emperors and poets. Then, trading urban rhythm for mountain serenity, Travelxploria transports you to Sapa’s remote highlands—share jasmine tea with H’mông villagers and learn their time-honored weaving craft beneath starlit skies. Finally, in Saigon’s electric embrace, rooftop cocktails toast against neon skyscrapers, and an evening street-food expedition unveils the spicy harmony of nước sâm and bánh xèo. Throughout every moment, from private limousines to handpicked boutique hideaways and heartfelt encounters, Travelxploria curates an odyssey that blends Vietnam’s storied past with its vibrant present—leaving you spellbound and yearning to return.

Upon arrival at Noi Bai International Airport, you will be warmly greeted by Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with our professional driver. Sit back and relax as we take you on a comfortable 50-minute transfer to Hanoi city. (Note: Hotel check-in is officially from 14:00, early check-in is subject to hotel availability and regulations, and can be arranged upon request.) In the afternoon, your Hanoi exploration begins with a guided visit to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, built in 1070 by the Ly Emperor and dedicated to Confucius, sages, and scholars. Next, admire the picturesque Hoan Kiem Lake (Restore Sword Lake) before enjoying free shopping at Dong Xuan Market, Hang Gai, Hang Dao, and Hang Ngang—bustling streets filled with specialty shops selling silk clothing, lacquerware, embroidered linens, and traditional crafts.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

packages.overview:
• Athens – The Cradle of Civilization

  • Santorini – A Romantic Paradise

    • Explore the Acropolis of Athens, home to the Parthenon and a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

    • Visit the Temple of Olympian Zeus and Ancient Agora, once the heart of Athenian democracy.

    • Wander through the charming Plaka District, lined with neoclassical houses, tavernas, and boutiques.

  • Mykonos – The Island of Glamour

    • Witness the world-famous sunset from Oia Village, with its blue-domed churches and whitewashed houses.

    • Relax at Red Beach and Perissa Beach, famous for their volcanic sands and crystal-clear waters.

    • Visit the ancient ruins of Akrotiri, a Minoan city preserved under volcanic ash.

  • Crete – The Land of Legends

    • Stroll through Mykonos Town (Chora) with its narrow alleyways, windmills, and vibrant nightlife.

    • Unwind on the pristine shores of Paradise Beach, known for its lively beach clubs.

    • Take a boat trip to Delos Island, one of Greece’s most important mythological and archaeological sites.

  1. Meteora – Monasteries in the Sky

    • Explore the Palace of Knossos, the center of the Minoan civilization.

    • Hike the Samaria Gorge, one of Europe’s longest and most scenic gorges.

    • Visit Elafonissi Beach, known for its pink sand and shallow turquoise waters.

  • Delphi – The Oracle’s Legacy

    • Discover the awe-inspiring Meteora Monasteries, perched on towering rock formations.

    • Experience the serenity of this UNESCO-listed site, a spiritual retreat for centuries.

  • Zakynthos – The Ionian Gem

    • Marvel at the stunning Navagio Beach (Shipwreck Beach), accessible only by boat.

    • Swim in the Blue Caves, famous for their vibrant blue reflections.

    • Visit the ancient sanctuary of Apollo at Delphi, once the most revered oracle of the ancient world.

    • Walk the Sacred Way and admire the ruins of the Temple of Apollo and Tholos of Delphi.

Later in the afternoon, our representative will provide all the essential details about the upcoming adventure—either in person or through the information boards at the hotel reception.

We´ll embark on a city tour of Athens with a local guide, visiting landmarks such as the Presidential Mansion, the Panathenaic Stadium where the first modern Olympic Games were held, the National Library, and the bustling squares of the city center. We´ll also explore the newer neighborhoods that developed after the 2004 Olympic Games. The tour will conclude at the Acropolis (admission not included). In the evening, we´ll provide a transfer to the historical neighborhood of Plaka, renowned for its charming Greek tavernas and opportunities to immerse yourself in the rich folklore of this country.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Kalabaka","country":"Greece","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Athens to Kalabaka","day_summary":"

We’ll depart early in the morning towards northern Greece, stopping at Kamena Vourla, a charming seaside tourist hub surrounded by stunning landscapes. We´ll then proceed north, stopping at the Thermopylae Mountain Pass, the historic site of the famous battle. Next, we´ll visit Kastraki, a picturesque village with beautiful views of the entire valley, where you´ll have free time for lunch. Afterward, we´ll explore the Meteora, a breathtaking UNESCO World Heritage Site. Admission to one of its renowned monasteries is included. Dinner will be provided in Kalabaka.

We’ll journey south through the Thessaly region, where you’ll experience stunning landscapes, before reaching Delphi. Here, we´ll explore the exquisite archaeological site overlooking the Gulf of Corinth, with breathtaking views. There will be time for lunch. Following that, we´ll head to the Hosios Loukas Monastery, renowned as one of the most beautiful Byzantine monasteries in Greece and a World Heritage Site. Its magnificent 11th-century mosaics are truly remarkable. We´ll then continue our journey towards Athens, arriving in the evening.

You´ll have free time in the morning to enjoy the city, visit museums, or shop. In the afternoon, we´ll transfer to the Piraeus Port to board a night ferry, featuring cruise-like amenities. You´ll stay in a double cabin and spend the night on board.

Arrival at 7:00 a.m. in Heraklion on the island of Crete. We’ll travel along the coast towards the west of the island. Our first stop is Rethymno, a beautiful coastal city of Venetian origin, dominated by its medieval castle. Next, we’ll visit Chania, a captivating city with an impressive fortress and stately mansions. Chania has been contested by Romans, Byzantines, Venetians, Genoese, Turks, Egyptians, and Greeks throughout its history. We´ll return to Heraklion at the end of the day.

Today, we’ll embark on an excursion to the Palace of Knossos, where we´ll delve into the Minoan culture that laid the foundation for Greek civilization four thousand years ago (admission and guided tour included). After our visit, we’ll travel through the island´s tall mountains and journey southward to the shores of the Libyan Sea, arriving at Agia Galini—a picturesque town with winding streets, a charming fishing port, and crowded taverns. You’ll have time for lunch and, if you wish, a swim in the sea. We´ll return to the capital of Crete at day’s end.

We’ll travel along the coast towards the east of the island. Our first stop will be in the small town of Kritsa to visit Panagia Kera, a 13th-century church renowned for its exquisite frescoes (admission included). Afterward, we’ll arrive at Agios Nikolaos, a picturesque town with a natural port. You’ll have time to stroll and enjoy lunch. Next, we’ll continue to Elounda, a former city-state turned into a beautiful tourist enclave. Here, we’ll embark on a boat ride to Spinalonga Island to visit the Fortress of Spinalonga, an ancient Venetian fortress later used as a leper colony for many years. After the visit, we’ll return by boat and head back to Heraklion for accommodation.

Early in the morning, we’ll transfer to the port and board a high-speed ferry to Santorini, arriving between 09:00 and 10:00 a.m. From there, we’ll journey by bus through stunning landscapes to Oia, undoubtedly the most spectacular town on the island: vibrant white streets, beautiful cliff views, remnants of a castle, and windmills. You’ll have time for lunch and a leisurely stroll. Later, we’ll visit Fira, the island’s capital. Those interested can descend to the port by cable car or donkey and admire the cruise ships. Afterwards, we’ll proceed to the port to board a high-speed ferry departing around 03:15 p.m. Arrival in Athens expected around midnight.

packages.package_name: Greece to Italy Timeless Cities and Seaside Wonders
packages.overview:
• Athens

    • Acropolis of Athens: Home to the iconic Parthenon, a symbol of Ancient Greece.

    • Temple of Olympian Zeus: One of the largest temples of ancient Greece, located in the heart of Athens.

    • Plaka District: A charming neighborhood filled with traditional Greek houses, cafes, and shops.

    • National Archaeological Museum: Displays some of the most important ancient artifacts of Greek civilization.

  • Santorini

    • Oia Village: Famous for its whitewashed buildings, blue domes, and stunning sunsets over the Aegean Sea.

    • Fira Town: The island's bustling capital with shops, restaurants, and cliffside views.

    • Red Beach: A dramatic beach with red sand and crystal-clear waters.

    • Akrotiri Archaeological Site: An ancient Minoan settlement destroyed by a volcanic eruption.

  • Mykonos

    • Mykonos Town (Chora): Known for its narrow streets, whitewashed buildings, and vibrant nightlife.

    • Paradise Beach: A lively beach known for its beach clubs, bars, and parties.

    • Delos Island: A UNESCO World Heritage Site, known for its ancient ruins and historical significance.

    • Little Venice: A picturesque area in Mykonos Town with buildings right on the water.

  • Crete

    • Knossos Palace: The largest archaeological site of Minoan civilization.

    • Elafonissi Beach: Famous for its pink sand and clear waters.

    • Samaria Gorge: A popular hiking destination in the White Mountains, offering stunning views and natural beauty.

    • Heraklion Archaeological Museum: A museum showcasing Minoan artifacts from Crete.

Italy

  • Rome

    • Colosseum: The ancient amphitheater where gladiators once fought, one of the greatest symbols of Ancient Rome.

    • Vatican City: The smallest country in the world, home to the Pope and the famous St. Peter's Basilica and Sistine Chapel.

    • Roman Forum: The ruins of ancient government buildings and temples at the heart of ancient Rome.

    • Pantheon: A well-preserved ancient Roman temple with a stunning dome.

    • Trevi Fountain: A baroque masterpiece and one of the largest fountains in Rome.

  • Florence

    • Duomo di Firenze: The iconic cathedral with a stunning dome designed by Brunelleschi.

    • Uffizi Gallery: Home to world-famous artworks, including pieces by Botticelli, Michelangelo, and Leonardo da Vinci.

    • Ponte Vecchio: A historic bridge lined with shops selling jewelry, art, and souvenirs.

    • Piazza della Signoria: A lively square with Renaissance sculptures, including a replica of Michelangelo’s David.

  • Venice

    • St. Mark's Basilica: A stunning example of Byzantine architecture with golden mosaics.

    • Rialto Bridge: A famous bridge spanning the Grand Canal, lined with shops.

    • Gondola Ride: A romantic boat ride through the canals of Venice.

    • Doge’s Palace: A gothic-style palace once home to the Venetian rulers.

  • Milan

    • Duomo di Milano: A gothic cathedral, one of the largest in the world.

    • The Last Supper: Leonardo da Vinci’s famous painting housed in the Convent of Santa Maria delle Grazie.

    • Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II: An elegant shopping gallery, home to luxury stores and restaurants.

    • Sforza Castle: A historic fortress with museums and art collections.

  • Amalfi Coast

    • Positano: A picturesque cliffside town with colorful buildings and stunning beaches.

    • Ravello: Famous for its beautiful villas, including Villa Cimbrone and Villa Rufolo.

    • Amalfi Town: Known for its historical cathedral and lovely coastal scenery.

    • Capri Island: A glamorous island with upscale shopping, beaches, and the Blue Grotto.

Experience the best of ancient and modern Athens on this comprehensive guided tour with Travelxploria's expert guides. Begin at Syntagma Square, the heart of the city, where history and modern life blend seamlessly. Visit the Temple of Olympian Zeus, one of the largest temples of the ancient world, and marvel at its towering columns. Explore the National Archaeological Museum, home to an extensive collection of Greek artifacts, sculptures, and treasures from antiquity. With Travelxploria’s knowledgeable experts, gain deep insights into Athens’ rich heritage, architectural wonders, and vibrant culture, making this tour a perfect introduction to the city’s timeless charm.

","a_weekday":"[]","a_offday":"[]","status":"A","supplier":"","relative_city":"[\"Athens\"]","inserted_id":"[547]","edited_by_id":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","imageurl":"","images":"[{\"path\":\"/Activity/Athens/Athens City Tour/1740744071494-istockphoto-537367193-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Athens/Athens City Tour/1740744071581-istockphoto-961163194-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Athens/Athens City Tour/1740744071663-istockphoto-1055006202-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Athens/Athens City Tour/1740744071709-istockphoto-1318598305-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Athens/Athens City Tour/1740744071792-istockphoto-1141586781-612x612.jpg\"}]"}}]}]},{"city":"Patras","country":"Greece","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Athens to Patras ","day_summary":"

We’ll travel to the Peloponnese, making a brief stop at the Corinth Canal, an impressive engineering marvel from the late nineteenth century. Continuing through the mountains, we’ll reach Tripoli, the capital of the Arcadia region. Here, we’ll take a break to explore the bustling Aeros Square, known for its cafes and restaurants. Our journey will then take us to Olympia, where we’ll visit the Archaeological Site with a local guide (tickets included). The first Olympic Games were held here in 776 B.C., attracting athletes from all over Greece and its colonies. Highlights of the site include the Temple of Zeus, the Stadium, the Gymnasium, and the Arena. Next, we’ll proceed to Patras, the third largest city in Greece, with a remarkable medieval fortress and the largest cathedral in the country. Adjacent to the cathedral is the small church of St. Andrew, a significant place of pilgrimage. Dinner will be included.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Athens","to":"Patras","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":806,"h_name":"MY WAY HOTEL & EVENTS","h_country":"Greece","h_city":"Patras","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Patras/MY WAY HOTEL & EVENTS/1741595114514-tsakanikas-39.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Patras/MY WAY HOTEL & EVENTS/1741595114630-2021-10-03.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Patras/MY WAY HOTEL & EVENTS/1741595114635-tsakanikas-52.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Brindisi","country":"Italy","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Visiting Brindisi","day_summary":"

After breakfast, we’ll cross the Rio–Antirrio Bridge, a spectacular suspension bridge that connects the Peloponnese with the Greek mainland. We’ll travel through the regions of Central Greece and Epirus. Upon arrival in Igoumenitsa, a port town, there will be time for a stroll before boarding the modern ferry at 02:00 p.m. to sail across the Ionian Sea to Italy. We’ll reach Brindisi by the end of the day, around 09:00 p.m., where we’ll spend the night.

Today, we’ll visit two extraordinary and authentic towns. Our first stop will be Alberobello, famous for its unique conical-shaped houses known as trulli. These distinctive structures, with their stacked stone roofs, are a UNESCO World Heritage Site and represent a remarkable example of Italian rural architecture. Next, we’ll head to Matera, located in the Basilicata region, renowned for its ancient historic center and the Sassi di Matera—a complex of ancient dwellings and buildings carved into the rock, dating back thousands of years. Not only is it a World Heritage Site, but also one of the oldest continuously inhabited human settlements in the world. In the afternoon, after enjoying an included lunch in Matera, we’ll continue our journey through Basilicata and Campania, taking in the beautiful mountain landscapes. We’ll arrive in Naples by evening, where you’ll have free time to explore.

After breakfast, we´ll head to the port in Naples to board a boat to the Island of Capri, where you can choose to take a boat to Grotta Bianca or the funicular to Capri city. After lunch, we’ll reboard and head to Sorrento, a charming tourist town nestled at the base of a cliff, where you’ll have free time to wander. Our journey will then take us to the Gulf of Salerno, where we’ll stay in the city of Salerno.

We’ll journey to the south of the boot, marveling at the stunning southern Italian scenery as we cross the Cilento National Park. We’ll arrive in Paola, located on the shores of the Tyrrhenian Sea, where we’ll visit the Sanctuary of St. Francis of Paola and enjoy free time for lunch in its charming historic center. Our adventure will then take us to Villa San Giovanni, where we’ll board a short ferry crossing to the island of Sicily. Upon arrival in Messina, we’ll have time to stroll around the cathedral. Finally, we’ll continue to Taormina. Dinner will be included.

Nestled at the foot of Mount Etna, the beautiful city of Taormina was once described by Churchill as the most beautiful place on earth. You’ll have time to explore the vibrant old town, where the Greek theater is set against the breathtaking landscape. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey toward the center of the island. Our next stop will be Caltagirone, a UNESCO World Heritage Site known for its impressive Baroque architecture. You’ll get to ride a little tourist train (included), where you’ll learn about the city and its key landmarks. Caltagirone is also the ceramic capital of Sicily, as seen in its numerous shops, workshops, and iconic sites, including the famous 142-step staircase, each step uniquely decorated with colorful tiles. After lunch, you’ll tour Villa Romana del Casale with a local guide (admission and tour included), another UNESCO World Heritage Site. In the Roman Empire, villas were symbols of agricultural wealth, and Villa del Casale is exceptional not only for its well-preserved 4th-century architecture but also for its stunning mosaics, which adorn almost every room, considered the finest in the Roman world. We’ll then cross the island’s mountainous interior and continue to Palermo, arriving by the end of the day. Dinner will be included.

Today, we’ll embark on a guided city tour of Palermo with a local expert. Highlights include the cathedral, famous for its blend of architectural styles and royal tombs (admission included), and the Palazzo dei Normanni, a former royal palace with fountains, markets, and gardens. We’ll also visit Monreale to see its cathedral , a UNESCO World Heritage Site celebrated for its breathtaking golden mosaics that adorn the entire interior. The afternoon is yours to enjoy at your leisure.

We’ll include a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. From our bus, we’ll immerse ourselves in this city, an open-air museum filled with sights like the Colosseum, the Roman Forum, and its iconic basilicas, where every corner tells a story. Our tour will conclude in Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums. The afternoon will be free.

At the end of the day, we’ll include a transfer to Trastevere, a lively neighborhood known for its charming, traditional restaurants.

packages.overview: Embark on a seamless Southeast Asian escape with Travelxploria, beginning in Singapore where you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for a leisurely welcome. Dive into island thrills on Sentosa—with round-trip cable car rides and Siloso Beach lounging—before immersing yourself in the region’s botanical wonders at the National Orchid Garden and Gardens by the Bay. Next, fly to idyllic Langkawi for an exclusive Rainforest & Waterfall Explorer tour, followed by a Wildlife Paradise & Island Discovery adventure showcasing mangrove ecosystems and hidden coves. Finally, savor your last moments of tropical relaxation before Travelxploria ensures your smooth departure home.

Kickstart your day with an exhilarating two-way Sentosa Cable Car ride, where breathtaking panoramic views of the city and coastline unfold before your eyes. Our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless pick-up from your hotel, making your journey effortless. As you glide above the cityscape, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will share fascinating insights about Singapore’s skyline and Sentosa’s vibrant history.

Upon arrival, step into the tropical paradise of Siloso Beach, where sun-kissed sands and gentle waves invite you to unwind. Whether you choose to relax, take a refreshing dip, or stroll along the scenic shore, the experience is pure bliss. Our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will be at your service throughout, ensuring a hassle-free experience. After a rejuvenating day by the beach, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of Sentosa’s charm.

Begin your day with a seamless pick-up by our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a smooth journey to the breathtaking National Orchid Garden. As you step into this floral paradise, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will lead you through a mesmerizing display of over 1,000 orchid species, sharing fascinating stories about these exotic blooms. Stroll through vibrant, meticulously curated gardens at your own pace. After a refreshing experience, our best on-ground support staff will ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Along the way, discover Langkawi’s fascinating legends and exotic wildlife, making every moment truly magical. Resort 3.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Langkawi Wildlife Paradise – Island Discovery","day_summary":"

Get ready for an exciting wildlife adventure with Travelxploria as we take you to the Langkawi Wildlife Park, a paradise for animal lovers! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a hassle-free journey. Led by our expert guide, explore this award-winning park, home to over 150 species of birds and animals from around the world. Feed friendly deer, marvel at vibrant macaws, and interact with adorable rabbits and exotic reptiles. Witness the fascinating walk-in aviary, where tropical birds fly freely around you. Enjoy engaging animal shows and learn about wildlife conservation in this immersive experience. Whether you're visiting with family or exploring solo, this trip promises unforgettable moments with nature. After a fun-filled and interactive visit, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable wildlife experience in Langkawi!

Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day.

Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day.

packages.package_name: Vibrant Malaysia: A Journey of Culture, Adventure & Luxury
packages.overview:
• Iconic Petronas Towers – Stunning twin towers offering breathtaking panoramic city views.
  • Lively Chinatown – Bustling streets filled with vibrant markets, authentic street food, and cultural heritage.
  • Historic Merdeka Square – A grand colonial-era landmark where Malaysia’s independence was declared.
  • Cultural George Town – A UNESCO-listed heritage city with colorful street art and colonial-era architecture.
  • Majestic Blue Mansion – A beautifully preserved 19th-century Peranakan-style mansion rich in history.
  • Scenic Penang Hill – A cool hilltop retreat offering breathtaking island views.
  • Serene Botanical Gardens – Lush green paradise showcasing exotic plants and tropical beauty.
  • Thrilling Escape Park – An adrenaline-pumping adventure park with zip lines, water slides, and obstacle courses.
  • Golden Batu Ferringhi Beach – A pristine beach perfect for relaxation, water sports, and seaside dining.
  • Tropical Langkawi – A breathtaking island paradise with turquoise waters, lush landscapes, and sandy beaches.
  • Relaxing Pantai Cenang – A lively beachfront lined with cafes, bars, and soft golden sands.
  • Mesmerizing Sunset Cruise – A tranquil sailing experience with stunning ocean views and fiery sunset hues.
  • Spectacular Langkawi Sky Bridge – A jaw-dropping curved bridge suspended above lush green valleys.
  • Exhilarating Cable Car Ride – A thrilling ascent offering panoramic views of Langkawi’s islands and sea.
  • Enchanting Kilim Geoforest Park – A stunning mangrove ecosystem with mysterious caves and unique limestone formations.
  • Luxurious Farewell Dinner – A delectable seafood feast with ocean views under a starlit sky.

Begin your journey at the Malaysian Museum of Islamic Art, home to an exquisite collection of artifacts, manuscripts, and architectural marvels. Next, dive into the bustling energy of Central Market and Chinatown, where you can shop for unique souvenirs and indulge in authentic Malaysian street food. As night falls, experience Kuala Lumpur’s electric nightlife at Changkat Bukit Bintang, a lively hub filled with vibrant bars, live music, and an unforgettable atmosphere.

Start your Langkawi City Tour with an exhilarating ride on the Langkawi Cable Car, ascending Mount Machinchang to reach the iconic Sky Bridge, where you’ll be treated to breathtaking panoramic views of the island’s lush landscapes and turquoise waters. Next, embark on a scenic boat tour through Kilim Karst Geoforest Park, navigating through serene mangrove forests, stunning limestone caves, and unique rock formations while spotting diverse wildlife. As the day comes to a close, indulge in a memorable farewell dinner by the sea, savoring fresh seafood and local delicacies while watching the waves roll in. Our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless, hassle-free experience with top-tier ground support throughout the day.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Langkawi","day_summary":"


Savor your final morning in Langkawi with a delightful breakfast, soaking in the island’s tranquil charm. Take some time for last-minute shopping, picking up duty-free souvenirs or handcrafted treasures, or opt for a short sightseeing trip to capture the island’s beauty one last time. Our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless departure experience with hassle-free transfers to the airport. As you board your flight, reflect on your incredible journey through Malaysia, filled with vibrant culture, fascinating history, and breathtaking natural wonders. Depart with unforgettable memories, knowing that your Malaysian adventure was truly extraordinary. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again!

packages.overview:
• Langkawi – Arrival & City Tour
    Arrive, check in, and explore Batik Art Village, Cenang Beach, Underwater World, Kuah Town, and Combo Cable Car.
  • Langkawi – Island Hopping
    Enjoy eagle feeding, swim at Pregnant Maiden Island, and relax at Beras Basah Island.
  • Kuala Lumpur – Arrival & Night Tour
    Fly to Kuala Lumpur, check in, and visit Chinatown, Sri Mahamariamman Temple, Independence Square, Petronas Towers, and KL Tower.
  • Kuala Lumpur – Genting Highlands
    Take a scenic cable car ride to Genting Highlands, visit casinos, and explore Batu Caves.
  • Kuala Lumpur – Departure
    Check out and transfer to the airport.

packages.package_name: Unveiling Malaysia From Kuala Lumpur to Langkawi
packages.overview:
• ​Arrive in Kuala Lumpur – Warm Welcome & Hotel Check-in
    ​Half-Day City Tour – Explore Iconic Landmarks of Kuala Lumpur
  • Genting Highlands & Batu Caves – Cable Car Ride & Cultural Wonders
  • Fly to Langkawi – Check-in & Relax in Paradise
  • ​Langkawi Island Hopping – Beaches, Eagles & Scenic Beauty
  • ​Mangrove & Cave Exploring – Wildlife Adventure on Water
  • ​Departure – Farewell to Malaysia with Unforgettable Memories​

Embark on an exciting Half-Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria, where our representative will ensure a seamless experience from start to finish. Accompanied by our experienced tour guide, dive into the city’s rich cultural heritage and stunning modern architecture. Enjoy photo stops at iconic landmarks such as the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque. Discover Malaysia’s sweet side with a visit to the Cocoa Centre, where you can learn about the country’s renowned chocolate industry. The tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, allowing you to soak in the vibrant atmosphere of Kuala Lumpur. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff ensuring smooth transitions and comfort throughout the tour, this experience will be both enriching and hassle-free.

Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day.

Embark on a thrilling Langkawi Mangrove & Cave Exploring Tour with Travelxploria for an adventure through nature’s wonders! Your journey begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up by our friendly representative. With our expert guide, set off on a scenic boat ride along the Kilim River, surrounded by lush mangroves and towering limestone formations. Witness exotic wildlife, from eagles soaring above to playful macaques along the riverbanks. Explore the mysterious Bat Cave, home to hundreds of resting bats, and be amazed by the stunning rock formations inside. Continue your adventure to the Crocodile Cave, where the river flows through a limestone tunnel, creating a breathtaking natural spectacle. Experience the famous floating fish farm, where you can interact with marine life. As the tour comes to an end, soak in the serenity of Langkawi’s untouched beauty before we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

Embark on a thrilling Langkawi Mangrove & Cave Exploring Tour with Travelxploria for an adventure through nature’s wonders! Your journey begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up by our friendly representative. With our expert guide, set off on a scenic boat ride along the Kilim River, surrounded by lush mangroves and towering limestone formations. Witness exotic wildlife, from eagles soaring above to playful macaques along the riverbanks. Explore the mysterious Bat Cave, home to hundreds of resting bats, and be amazed by the stunning rock formations inside. Continue your adventure to the Crocodile Cave, where the river flows through a limestone tunnel, creating a breathtaking natural spectacle. Experience the famous floating fish farm, where you can interact with marine life. As the tour comes to an end, soak in the serenity of Langkawi’s untouched beauty before we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

packages.package_name: Magical Malaysia A Perfect Blend of Adventure, Nature, and Culture
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Langkawi
    Arrive in Langkawi, enjoy a scenic Langkawi Cable Car ride, and visit the Langkawi Wildlife Park.
  • Explore Langkawi's Attractions
    Relax at Pantai Cenang Beach, discover the Paradise 3D Museum, and admire Telaga Tujuh Waterfalls.
  • Journey to Kuala Lumpur and Malacca
    Fly to Kuala Lumpur, explore historical Malacca, and visit the iconic Petronas Twin Towers.
  • Discover Kuala Lumpur's Sights
    Visit the Kuala Lumpur Bird Park, Batu Caves, and the National Mosque of Malaysia.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur
    Check out from your hotel, transfer to the airport, and conclude your memorable trip.

As you arrive in the breathtaking island of Langkawi, our Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you at the airport, ensuring a smooth and comfortable transfer to your hotel. After checking in, let the adventure begin with an exhilarating ride on the Langkawi Cable Car, where you'll ascend 650 meters above sea level, taking in panoramic views of lush rainforests and the Andaman Sea. Our experienced tour guide will share fascinating insights about the island’s geology and culture, making the journey even more enriching. Next, we take you to the Langkawi Wildlife Park, where you can get up close with over 150 species of birds and animals. With our best on-ground support staff ensuring a seamless experience, all you have to do is immerse yourself in the beauty of Langkawi’s nature and wildlife. Enjoy a stress-free day filled with wonder, perfectly curated by Travelxploria.

Resort 3.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Pantai Cenang Beach - Paradise 3D Museum - Telaga Tujuh Waterfalls","day_summary":"

Escape to the stunning Cenang Beach with Travelxploria, where golden sands and turquoise waters create the perfect tropical retreat. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your beachside adventure. Guided by our expert travel companion, stroll along the palm-fringed shore, feeling the soft sand beneath your feet. Dive into thrilling water sports, from jet skiing to parasailing, or simply unwind with a cocktail while soaking in the breathtaking sunset. Explore lively beachfront cafes, indulge in local seafood delights, or shop for souvenirs at the nearby markets. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Cenang Beach offers the best of both worlds. As the sun dips below the horizon, painting the sky in fiery hues, we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with memories of a truly magical seaside escape.

Step into a world of illusion and creativity with Travelxploria as we take you to 3D Art in Paradise Langkawi, the largest 3D art museum in Malaysia! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle for a hassle-free journey. With our expert guide, explore interactive and mind-bending artworks across multiple themed zones, from underwater worlds to fantasy landscapes. Pose with realistic optical illusions, where you become part of the art in stunning, Instagram-worthy scenes. Experience immersive storytelling through 3D paintings that bring your imagination to life. Our guide will help you find the best photo spots to create unforgettable memories. Whether walking on a rickety bridge or diving into an ocean, every corner offers a new surprise. After a fun-filled adventure in this interactive museum, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience in Langkawi!

Immerse yourself in the natural beauty of Telaga Tujuh Waterfalls, one of Langkawi’s most breathtaking attractions, with Travelxploria. Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, journey to this stunning \"Seven Wells Waterfall,\" named after its seven natural pools. Hike through lush rainforest trails, encountering exotic flora and fauna along the way. Feel the refreshing mist as cascading waters create a mesmerizing spectacle. Take a dip in the cool pools, slide down natural rock formations, or simply relax amidst nature’s serenity. For thrill-seekers, a short climb rewards you with panoramic views of Langkawi’s landscape. Capture stunning photos of this magical haven before we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience. Whether for adventure or relaxation, Telaga Tujuh promises an unforgettable encounter with Langkawi’s natural wonders.

Bid farewell to Langkawi as our Travelxploria representative ensures a smooth transfer to the airport for your flight to Kuala Lumpur. Upon arrival, our experienced tour guide will greet you and take you on a fascinating journey to Malacca, a UNESCO World Heritage Site brimming with colonial charm, historic forts, and vibrant culture. Wander through Dutch Square, St. Paul’s Hill, and Jonker Street, soaking in the rich heritage and indulging in local delights. With our best on-ground support staff taking care of every detail, your journey remains seamless and stress-free. As the day winds down, prepare to be amazed by the Petronas Twin Towers, standing tall as Malaysia’s most iconic landmark. Gaze at the city lights from the sky bridge, capturing unforgettable memories. With Travelxploria, every step of your journey is effortlessly curated, ensuring comfort, exploration, and awe-inspiring experiences.

Begin your avian adventure as Travelxploria’s friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Upon arrival at KL Bird Park, our expert guide will lead you through the world’s largest free-flight aviary, where thousands of exotic birds roam in lush, natural habitats. Marvel at colorful macaws, majestic hornbills, and playful flamingos as they soar freely around you. Enjoy interactive feeding sessions, witness captivating bird shows, and capture stunning photographs amidst the lush greenery. Learn about Malaysia’s diverse bird species and conservation efforts at the park’s educational exhibits. Whether you’re a nature lover or a photography enthusiast, this experience promises unforgettable moments. After an enchanting day surrounded by chirping melodies and fluttering wings, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and delightful journey with Travelxploria!

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

Begin your spiritual and cultural journey as Travelxploria’s representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Upon arrival at the National Mosque of Malaysia (Masjid Negara), our expert guide will provide fascinating insights into its stunning architecture, rich Islamic heritage, and deep cultural significance. Admire the mosque’s grand 73-meter-high minaret, striking blue-tiled dome, and beautifully landscaped gardens. Step inside the vast prayer hall, where intricate Islamic calligraphy and elegant design create a serene ambiance. Learn about Malaysia’s diverse Islamic influences and the mosque’s role in the nation’s spiritual life. Stroll through the reflecting pools and fountains, capturing breathtaking photos of this iconic landmark. Whether seeking cultural enrichment or peaceful reflection, this visit promises an unforgettable experience. After exploring, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and enriching journey with Travelxploria.​

Upon arrival at the National Mosque of Malaysia (Masjid Negara), our expert guide will provide fascinating insights into its stunning architecture, rich Islamic heritage, and deep cultural significance. Admire the mosque’s grand 73-meter-high minaret, striking blue-tiled dome, and beautifully landscaped gardens. Step inside the vast prayer hall, where intricate Islamic calligraphy and elegant design create a serene ambiance. Learn about Malaysia’s diverse Islamic influences and the mosque’s role in the nation’s spiritual life. Stroll through the reflecting pools and fountains, capturing breathtaking photos of this iconic landmark. Whether seeking cultural enrichment or peaceful reflection, this visit promises an unforgettable experience. After exploring, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and enriching journey with Travelxploria.​

As your unforgettable journey comes to an end, our Travelxploria representative will be there to ensure a smooth and hassle-free check-out from your hotel. With our experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff, every detail of your departure is handled with precision and care. You’ll be comfortably transferred to the airport, allowing you to relax and reflect on the incredible experiences you've had. Upon arrival, our team will assist you with check-in and security procedures, making sure everything runs seamlessly. As you board your flight back home, cherish the beautiful memories of your trip, knowing that Travelxploria was there every step of the way to make your journey truly special. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again for another adventure.

overview:
Beach Holidays – Where Every Wave Tells a Story | Travelxploria

Swaying palms, golden sands, and the endless rhythm of crashing waves—welcome to Travelxploria’s Beach Holidays, your passport to paradise. Whether you're traveling with your partner, family, or a group of friends, we curate soulful, sunlit escapes across continents. As your Best Travel Agency and trusted Best International Tour Operator, we bring you the finest coastal destinations through thoughtfully designed Couple Packages, Best Family Packages, and Romantic Packages—each one a journey of sunshine and sea.

Let your story unfold in the breathtaking Maldives, where overwater villas float above sapphire lagoons and candlelit dinners sparkle under starry skies. This island haven is the definition of luxury and the ultimate Best Honeymoon Package for couples who crave serenity and indulgence.

In Mauritius, stunning coral reefs meet lush volcanic peaks, creating a postcard-perfect setting for beach lovers. Whether you’re swimming with dolphins or enjoying a sunset cruise, Travelxploria’s Romantic Package here is designed for unforgettable moments.

For those who seek a blend of energy and elegance, Thailand offers island-hopping through Krabi, water sports in Phi Phi, and beachside nightlife in Phuket. It’s a top pick for both thrill-seekers and families, making it perfect for our Best Family Package or a lively Group Tour.

Malaysia surprises with its quiet charms—Langkawi's peaceful beaches and hidden waterfalls create the perfect backdrop for couples and families who seek both relaxation and adventure.

Sri Lanka, with its golden shores and spiritual soul, invites you to surf along Arugam Bay, relax at a coastal Ayurvedic resort, or wander beach towns filled with culture and charm. Whether for bonding or bliss, it’s ideal for every kind of traveler.

Closer to home, the Andaman Islands promise emerald waters and white sandy escapes. Dive into vibrant coral reefs at Havelock, kayak through mangrove forests, or enjoy bonfires by the bay. This Best Tour Package blends exploration with comfort.

For an offbeat gem, Lakshadweep delivers untouched beauty—secluded, serene, and soul-stirring. Perfect for honeymooners or anyone looking to unwind, this is tropical isolation at its finest.

In Europe, Greece brings romance to life with its iconic blue-domed cliffs, volcanic beaches, and Mediterranean charm. Whether it’s Mykonos or Santorini, you’ll fall in love all over again as part of our Best Honeymoon Package.

And finally, no beach escape is complete without Goa—India’s beloved seaside playground. Whether you're dancing under the stars in North Goa or sipping cocktails on quiet southern beaches, it’s a coastal dream come true. Goa’s blend of Portuguese charm, vibrant shacks, and water adventures makes it perfect for couples, friends, and families alike.

With Travelxploria, your Best Tour Operator, you don’t just visit beaches—you live them. As the Best International Tour Operator, we ensure every wave you ride, every sunset you watch, and every island you explore becomes a cherished memory. Whether you’re booking a Couple Package, a fun-filled Best Family Package, or a relaxing Romantic Package, our beach holidays are designed with heart and soul.

The ocean is calling. Let Travelxploria, your Best Travel Agency, take you there.
